overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic city. The clip begins under a concrete overpass by the water, ascends illuminated stairs, and explores a vibrant downtown street lined with palm trees, neon signs, and towering glass skyscrapers before waiting at a traffic intersection.

events.description: character stands up from fishing chair and begins ascending illuminated stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs from waterfront underpass toward street level

notable_agents.action: sitting in folding chair fishing by the water

entered.detail: large concrete bridge overhead with graffiti markings
stacked wooden cargo crates under the overpass
folding metal chair with fishing rod set up
concrete staircase with orange LED lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a concrete overpass by a water canal, where an NPC sits fishing. The player character ascends illuminated concrete stairs from this sheltered waterfront area toward the street level above.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street entrance with palm trees and neon signage

events.description: exits covered underpass into bright open city street with direct sunlight
direct sunlight illuminates the scene as camera emerges from shadow

agents.ego_description: walking alongside an NPC companion up the stairs and onto the city sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking alongside ego carrying a black duffel bag

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street entrance
futuristic glass tower with reflective blue surface
building facade with purple and green neon advertisements
futuristic cars parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass onto a sunlit city street, joining an NPC companion. The scene reveals towering glass skyscrapers, palm trees, and vibrant neon signage as they walk along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown pedestrian walkway with commercial buildings

events.description: camera pans upward to look at skyscrapers while continuing to walk forward
futuristic vehicle drives past on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk observing the cityscape and neon advertisements

elevated train track structure running above the street
concrete barrier separating sidewalk from water

segments.scene_description: Walking along the downtown sidewalk lined with palm trees, the character passes other pedestrians and futuristic vehicles. The camera pans up to admire the towering glass skyscrapers and elevated monorail tracks against the bright sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character stops at crosswalk waiting for traffic light to change
character looks around while waiting at intersection observing traffic

agents.ego_description: standing at crosswalk waiting for traffic signal to change, observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall circular structure with multiple stacked digital screens
futuristic traffic signal with orange housing showing red light
elevated highway or monorail support columns

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy intersection and stops at the crosswalk, waiting for the traffic signal. A cylindrical advertising tower dominates the center of the intersection while futuristic vehicles pass by, and the character observes the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered waterfront underpass into the bright, vertical expanse of a futuristic downtown district. It begins beneath a concrete overpass by a water canal where an NPC is fishing, before ascending illuminated concrete stairs toward the street level. As the character emerges from the shadows, the environment opens into a sunlit city street filled with palm trees, vibrant neon signage, and towering glass skyscrapers. The camera then pans upward to capture elevated monorail tracks against the bright sky while moving past pedestrians and futuristic vehicles along the sidewalk. Finally, the movement slows as the character reaches a busy intersection, stopping at a crosswalk beneath a dominant cylindrical advertising tower.
